# Copilot Instructions

## Code Style
- Use specific formatting rules
- Follow naming conventions

## Project-Specific Rules
- For the C++ WinVetSim application, ensure that edits to PHP/JS files in the sim-ii repository appear immediately in the running C++ app.
- Set up hot-reload or a development server to reflect changes in PHP while the C++ application is running.
